title: \TRANSPARENT=1 prevents BRAM inference if $memrd and $memwr are in asynchronous domains

features.name: bram_transparent_across_async_clock_domains
features.description: Code should include BRAM inference with TRANSPARENT=1 where $memrd and $memwr ports are in different clock domains

features.name: memory_port_transparent_attribute
features.description: Code should include a memory with transparent read/write behavior specified via attribute, causing BRAM mapping failure when clocks differ
